name: PHASE-12 full regression: service, secrets, backup, logging, auth, binding, uid_pin
description: Stage 12.7 meta-regression. Mirrors the S183 pattern (Phase 11 full regression). Asserts key PHASE-12 structural properties by file inspection — no LLM calls, no real OS APIs touched. Verifies: service lifecycle module loads; secret_provider exports the 4-tier resolution chain; backup tools registered (create, verify, restore, export); log_writer exists with §ARC-6 boundary respected; auth middleware registered on api_server; api_server binds 127.0.0.1 default (OQ-2 fix); uid_pin module exports checkOrCreateUidPin; all 6 §ARC entries documented in 18_AGENT_ROLES_CONTRACT.md (NO §ARC-7). Note: the plan artifact (DECISION-2026-05-18T11-30-phase-12-plan.md) referenced a 'baseline/' subdirectory for this file — superseded by repo convention; all scenarios live in code/src/testing/scenarios/ directly.
